CNCRNT_PT_WK_1_NUM O0401AB PT: Total Minutes Concurrent Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of concurrent physical therapy minutes provided in the first week of stay.
230 GRP_PT_WK_1_NUM GRP_PT_WK_1_NUM O0401AC PT: Total Minutes Group Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of group physical therapy minutes provided in the first week of stay.
